SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
SELECT hash(eventName) as qualityEventKey, eventName as qualityEventDescription
FROM GapsInCare
WHERE eventName IS NOT NULL AND eventName <> ''
UNION
SELECT -1 as qualityEventKey, 'UNKNOWN' as qualityEventDescription
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t 
USING 
(SELECT * FROM tempSQLScript) s
ON ifnull(s.qualityEventDescription, '') = ifnull(t.qualityEventDescription, '') 
WHEN NOT MATCHED 
    THEN INSERT (qualityEventKey, qualityEventDescription)
        VALUES (s.qualityEventKey, s.qualityEventDescription)
